flags.concern: travel-between-images-mode-switch-coverage: the plan only rewires the provider-backed `useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers` path, but the shipped `VideoGenerationModal` drives the same `MotionControl` surface from `useShotSettings` plus raw `updateField` calls. If the executor follows the plan literally, mode switches in the modal will still bypass the atomic handler and continue using non-atomic preset/config writes there.
flags.evidence: The modal controller reads `settings`/`updateField` directly from [useVideoGenerationModalController.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useVideoGenerationModalController.ts:241), and those raw setters are passed into the form in [VideoGenerationModal.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModal.tsx:106). The modal then wires `onGenerationTypeModeChange` to `updateField('generationTypeMode', v)` and `onPhasePresetSelect` to two separate field writes in [VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx:192) and [VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx:216). That same `MotionControl` path still invokes `usePresetAutoSelect` from [useMotionControlPresetState.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.ts:164).

flags.concern: phase-config-preset-sync: step 1 still leaves the advanced-mode `selectedPhasePresetId` contract under-specified. The repo currently allows advanced mode to retain a preset id, and request building forwards that id whenever it is truthy. If the handler starts force-rebuilding `phaseConfig` on I2V/VACE switches in advanced mode without also clearing or updating `selectedPhasePresetId`, the task payload can still carry a preset id that no longer matches the rebuilt config.
flags.evidence: Switching to advanced mode does not clear the preset id in [useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts:298), and the current generation-type handler's advanced branch also leaves `selectedPhasePresetId` untouched while changing mode in [useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts:370). Downstream, request serialization emits `selected_phase_preset_id` whenever the field is set in [segmentSettingsUtils.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/components/SegmentSettingsForm/segmentSettingsUtils.ts:117).
